title: Write Api bcscan , which will display which method id was used in the transaction

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Write Api bcscan , which will display which method id was used in the transaction

turns.speaker: assistant
user
turns.text: Write a code that will allow you to determine if liquidity has been added for a particular token. Use APIKey. BSC network

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
To determine if liquidity has been added for a specific token on the Binance Smart Chain (BSC) network, you can use the PancakeSwap API to get the liquidity pool data. Here is a Python example using the `requests` library:

```python
import requests

PANCAKESWAP_API_KEY = "API_KEY"
TOKEN_ADDRESS = "0x1234567890abcdef1234567890abcdef1234567890"

def get_liquidity(token_address):
    url = f'https://api.pancakeswap.info/api/v2/tokens/${token_address}'
    headers = {'x-api-key': PANCAKESWAP_API_KEY}
    
    response = requests.get(url, headers=headers)
    
    if response.status_code == 200:
        response_data = response.json()
        liquidity_bnb = response_data.get('data', {}).get('liquidity_bnb', None)
        return liquidity_bnb
    else:
        return None

liquidity_bnb = get_liquidity(TOKEN_ADDRESS)

if liquidity_bnb is not None:
    print(f'Liquidity (BNB): {liquidity_bnb}')
else:
    print('Failed to fetch liquidity data.')
```

Please replace `API_KEY` with your own PancakeSwap API key and `TOKEN_ADDRESS` with the address of the token you're interested in checking.

This code uses the PancakeSwap API to get the liquidity details for a specific token. If the token has liquidity added, the `liquidity_bnb` value will be greater than 0.

Please note that the PancakeSwap API is subject to rate limits. For more information, refer to the [PancakeSwap API documentation](https://medium.com/pancake-swap/get-token-info-via-the-pancakeswap-testnet-api-87fc8b3cbd49).
